data.description_suggestion: Cancels an in-progress attack simulation. Requires the simulationId path parameter. Stops the simulation execution immediately and returns the updated simulation object with status set to 'cancelled'. Any partial results collected before cancellation remain available. This operation only succeeds for simulations in 'running' or 'queued' status.
data.reasoning: Description is too brief and lacks operational details. Added information about required input (simulationId), what happens (execution stops), what is returned (updated simulation object with cancelled status), and important constraint about which simulation states can be cancelled.
